seo.metaTitle: Managed Cloud Hosting India — Fully Managed Cloud Infrastructure | ICSDC
seo.metaDescription: ICSDC Managed Cloud Hosting gives you enterprise cloud power without the complexity. 24/7 monitoring, auto-scaling, security, and expert support from ₹2,999/month.

api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.heroTitle: Fully Managed Cloud Hosting — Enterprise Power, Zero Complexity
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.heroSubtitle: Your Cloud. Our Expertise. Your Peace of Mind.
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.heroDescription: Stop worrying about infrastructure and focus on growing your business. ICSDC Managed Cloud delivers auto-scaling, 24/7 proactive monitoring, security hardening, and expert support — so you never have to touch a server.

pillars.title: Fully Managed
pillars.desc: Our team handles all OS updates, patches, security hardening, and performance tuning on your behalf.

pillars.title: 24/7 Monitoring
pillars.desc: Proactive monitoring catches issues before they impact your users — with instant alerts and auto-recovery.

pillars.title: Auto-Scaling
pillars.desc: Traffic spikes are handled automatically — your cloud scales up instantly and scales down to save cost.

pillars.title: Enterprise Security
pillars.desc: Firewall, DDoS protection, SSL, intrusion detection, and daily security audits included as standard.

api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.plansTitle: Managed Cloud Plans — Fully Handled, Always On
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.plansSubtitle: All plans include 24/7 managed support, monitoring, security, backups, and free migration.

plans.tagline: Managed cloud for startups and small applications
Full-featured managed cloud for growing businesses
High-performance managed cloud for enterprise workloads

api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.featuresTitle: Everything Managed, Nothing Left to Chance
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.featuresSubtitle: Every managed cloud plan includes the full stack of services your business needs to run smoothly.

features.title: OS & Software Updates
features.desc: Automated and supervised OS patches, kernel updates, and software upgrades applied on schedule.

features.title: Proactive Monitoring
features.desc: CPU, RAM, disk, and network metrics tracked 24/7 with instant alerts and auto-remediation.

features.title: Security Hardening
features.desc: Firewall rules, intrusion detection, malware scanning, and regular security audits by our team.

features.title: Automated Backups
features.desc: Daily to real-time backups with point-in-time recovery and 30-day retention.

features.title: Performance Tuning
features.desc: Server and application performance optimised by our cloud experts — faster load times guaranteed.

features.title: 24/7 Expert Support
features.desc: Direct access to senior cloud engineers via phone, chat, or ticket — any time, day or night.

api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.whyManagedTitle: Why Choose Managed Cloud Over Unmanaged?
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.whyManagedSubtitle: Unmanaged cloud is cheap — until a misconfiguration, security breach, or outage costs you far more.

whyManagedCards.title: Save Engineering Time
whyManagedCards.desc: Your developers focus on product, not infrastructure. We handle all server-level operations.

whyManagedCards.title: Stay Secure by Default
whyManagedCards.desc: Security patches, firewall rules, and vulnerability scans applied automatically — no gaps.

whyManagedCards.title: Scale Without Worry
whyManagedCards.desc: Auto-scaling handles traffic spikes instantly — no manual intervention required from your team.

whyManagedCards.title: Predictable Costs
whyManagedCards.desc: Fixed monthly pricing means no surprise bills. Our team optimises resource usage to control costs.

api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.servicesTitle: What Our Managed Cloud Team Does for You
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.servicesSubtitle: From initial setup to ongoing operations — we handle every layer of your cloud environment.

servicesCards.title: Cloud Architecture Design
servicesCards.desc: We design a cloud architecture tailored to your workload, traffic patterns, and growth plans.

servicesCards.title: Zero-Downtime Migration
servicesCards.desc: Free migration from any existing host — we handle data transfer, DNS, and cutover without downtime.

servicesCards.title: Resource Optimisation
servicesCards.desc: Right-sizing of compute, memory, and storage to maximise performance and minimise cost.

servicesCards.title: Compliance & Hardening
servicesCards.desc: GDPR, ISO 27001, and PCI-DSS alignment with documented security policies and audit reports.

servicesCards.title: Disaster Recovery
servicesCards.desc: Automated DR plans with RTO/RPO SLAs — restore your entire environment in minutes, not hours.

servicesCards.title: Monthly Reporting
servicesCards.desc: Detailed monthly reports on uptime, performance, security events, and cost optimisation.

api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.howItWorksTitle: From Sign-Up to Fully Managed in 4 Steps
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.howItWorksSubtitle: Getting started with ICSDC Managed Cloud is quick, simple, and guided by our team every step of the way.

howItWorksSteps.title: Consultation & Scoping
howItWorksSteps.description: We assess your current infrastructure, workloads, and requirements in a free 30-minute call.

howItWorksSteps.title: Architecture & Provisioning
howItWorksSteps.description: Our team designs and provisions your cloud environment — configured, secured, and optimised.

howItWorksSteps.title: Migration & Testing
howItWorksSteps.description: We migrate your data and applications with zero downtime, then run full QA before go-live.

howItWorksSteps.title: Ongoing Management
howItWorksSteps.description: 24/7 monitoring, patching, backups, and support — your cloud runs itself while you focus on business.

api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.useCasesTitle: Who Benefits from Managed Cloud Hosting?
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.useCasesSubtitle: Managed cloud is the right choice for any organisation that values uptime, security, and developer productivity.

useCases.title: SaaS Companies
useCases.desc: Keep your platform always-on with auto-scaling, managed databases, and zero-downtime deployments.

useCases.title: eCommerce Stores
useCases.desc: Handle peak traffic during sales and festivals with auto-scaling and 99.9% uptime SLA.

useCases.title: Digital Agencies
useCases.desc: Host dozens of client sites on a managed cloud with isolated environments and easy delegation.

useCases.title: Data-Intensive Apps
useCases.desc: Managed PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis with automated backups and replication.

ctaBand1.title: Ready to Move to Managed Cloud?
ctaBand1.description: Free migration, free consultation, and expert setup included with every plan.

api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.testimonialTitle: What Our Managed Cloud Clients Say
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.faqTitle: FAQs About ICSDC Managed Cloud Hosting
api::managed-cloud-hosting-page.managed-.faqContactDesc:
Our managed cloud team is available 24/7 for consultations, migrations, and technical support.

📞 +91 98109 58857

faq.question: What does 'fully managed' actually mean?
faq.answer: It means ICSDC handles all server-level operations on your behalf — OS updates, security patches, performance tuning, monitoring, backups, and incident response. You never need to SSH into a server or worry about infrastructure.

faq.question: How is managed cloud different from a regular VPS or cloud server?
faq.answer: An unmanaged server gives you raw compute resources and leaves everything else to you. Managed cloud includes a dedicated operations team that keeps your environment secure, updated, optimised, and running 24/7 — like having a senior DevOps engineer on call at all times.

faq.question: Can you migrate my existing website or application?
faq.answer: Yes. Free migration is included with all plans. Our team handles data transfer, application configuration, DNS cutover, and testing — with zero downtime for your users.

faq.question: What happens if my server goes down at 3 AM?
faq.answer: Our monitoring system detects the issue within seconds and triggers an automated recovery or alerts our on-call engineers. Critical incidents are responded to within 15 minutes around the clock.

faq.question: Can I scale resources up during peak traffic?
faq.answer: Yes. Auto-scaling is available on Business and Enterprise plans — your cloud automatically provisions additional resources during spikes and scales down during off-peak hours to control costs.

ctaBand2.title: Let Us Manage Your Cloud — You Focus on Growth
ctaBand2.description: Enterprise-grade managed cloud from ₹2,999/month. Free migration included.

testimonials.name: Amit Verma
testimonials.quote: Moved our entire platform to ICSDC Managed Cloud 6 months ago. Not a single outage since. Our engineers now focus on product features instead of firefighting infrastructure issues.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.quote: The migration was seamless — zero downtime, zero data loss. The 24/7 monitoring caught a memory leak before it impacted our students. Worth every rupee.

testimonials.name: Suresh Menon
testimonials.quote: Our Diwali sale traffic was 10x normal and the auto-scaling handled it perfectly. ICSDC Managed Cloud is the infrastructure backbone our business needed.
